chunks.text: First of all, if you write image.png in SRC,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML

chunks.text: You have done something wrong.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Or the server URL you have given, there is no image there.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, this kind of things are displayed like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And alt is displayed there.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, the user gets to know the purpose of this image.

chunks.text: And if I come back here,

chunks.text: then you can put alt in the image like this.

chunks.text: If I don't put alt, then what will happen?

chunks.text: If I don't put alt, then the alt text won't come.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, you won't want that when your server has an error,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: There are two more attributes of this image.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Which is very important.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: One is width.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Which is width in pixels.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: If I write 23, width is equal to.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You can see.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: In fact, I will fix the image first.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I have written image2 by mistake.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Image.png is here.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, you can see here.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I have taken 23 pixels.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Which is very small.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, I will make it 230 pixels.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You don't need to write px in this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: When we write width in CSS,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: then we will see that we need to write px.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Or we just write width is equal to double quotes in the number.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: As you can see.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Okay.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, if I bring it here,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: then we can see this small image.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: If I give it height.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I mean I will give it height.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I was saying that if I keep its height 230,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: then its aspect ratio will also get affected.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, it will get stretched.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Because it has made its width 230 and its height 230.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: As you can see.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Now, if you want its height to be 230 and width to be automatically adjusted,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: then you just use height attribute.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Now, remove the width one.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, its height will be 230 pixels.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And it will go as far as it can go in width.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: It will automatically adjust.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Now, look.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: It has been automatically adjusted in width.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And it has taken it in height.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Now, what happens is that width and height can be adjusted through CSS.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And we will see in the CSS section that why we should always set this width and height.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: We should always set one thing from width and height.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Such that when our page is loading,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: then our image inside the page will not come instantly in the page.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I will tell you in the coming videos.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: But now you understand that these width and height attributes,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I have heard many people saying that they have been deprecated.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: They should not use them now.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: But I say that they should use them for SEO purposes.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Why should they do it?

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I will tell you in the coming videos where I will tell you about core web vitals and SEO.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: For now, you understand that width gives the image to width.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Height gives the image to height.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: If one of them is attached, then the other one automatically gets set.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And these values are in pixels.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And you don't have to write px or pixel.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You just have to write this number.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And that's it.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: This is an attribute, height.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And there is an SRC attribute, an alt attribute.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You can also use style attribute in this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: In fact, you can use style attribute with almost all tags.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, this was about the image.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Now, we will talk about tables in HTML.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Table tags are very useful in HTML.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I will tell you what table tags are.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You get to see a table from table tags.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Now, I copy this table from here.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And when I copy this table from here, you can see that my page will look like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, this is the table of HTML.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Where is my preview page?

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Here it is.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Here, you can see the name, HarryAge100.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Now, if I put many other things here,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: suppose I put something like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Suppose I put name.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And here, let us say, designation.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Suppose I put Harry's designation.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I put programmer.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And let us say, I want to put more things.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I will use alt shift bottom arrow.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I will use alt shift bottom arrow.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And here, let us say, I want to write favorite language.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And I want to write, suppose, JavaScript.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Okay.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And now, you see that this table will look like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Name, destination, favorite language.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Okay.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, what is this?

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: How does it work?

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I will tell you.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Let us say, we have used table tag.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Table tag has tr tag, which is table row.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: What will come in this row?

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You will get to see this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Now, if you want to use this as table heading,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: you say that this is my table row.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: This row means this row.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: In which, name, destination and your favorite language are written.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: What will come in this row?

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And what will be that?

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Here, you can see that it will be a heading.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, I will use th.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: th means table heading.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And we will write that only once.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, in the first one, we will write th.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Once we have added the heading, then we will add the data.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, we will put td in table row.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Which stands for table data.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And here, all the rows you will add in tr,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: what will happen?

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Your rows will be added.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, here, suppose, I write Sam.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And this is also a programmer.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And suppose, this is Java, its favorite language.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, these rows will be added below the table.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You can see here that these rows are added, added, added.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: With CSS, we will see how it can be bordered.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: It can be styled.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: But it looks like this as default.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And yes, I know that it is ugly.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: But you just understand that the table works like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Now, there are rowspan and callspan attributes.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Now, you see here that rowspan means

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: how many rows your td will span.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: For example, let us say I write here,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I want Sam and programmer.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Earlier, they were taking one cell.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Sam was taking one cell.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Programmer was taking one cell.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I want to write Sam in two cells.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, I don't want to write programmer.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I just want to write Sam.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And I want to write here that call span is equal to 2.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, call span is equal to 2 means that Sam will now take the place of two columns.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: What does it mean?

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Sam will now take the place of two columns.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: That means Sam will look something like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I'll show you.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Something like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, it took the place of these columns.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Okay?

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, the call span means how many columns will be surrounded.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: By default, only one cell will be surrounded.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: But sometimes, one cell will be surrounded by two columns.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: To demonstrate this, I will explain it to you in Excel.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: In Excel, you can think of it as a table of our HTML.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Sometimes, I want two columns to be spanned by one data.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, here we use merge cell.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And here, suppose I write Sam.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: In HTML, this is done by using call span.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Sometimes, we want to merge them vertically.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Suppose, I want to merge these two cells.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: There, we use row span.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And now, we'll talk about the list.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: List is very important in HTML.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Because we'll use list a lot.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: There are three types of lists in HTML.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: One is ordered list, another is unordered list,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: and the other is definition list.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Unordered and ordered lists are the most used.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Let's first look at unordered list.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Whenever we want to have unordered data.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Like I'll write here, UL.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, I'll write here as UL.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: It means unordered list.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I can write li in it.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And I can write Harry.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And then I can write Rohan.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And then I can write Shubham.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, when I write Harry Rohan Shubham,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: this UL will come like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: This is unordered list.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Look, Harry Rohan Shubham is here.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: There's no order for this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: There's no 1, 2, 3, 4 in it.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: But if I want it to be ordered,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: then I can write this with the help of OL.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, if I make its opening closing tag OL,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: and keep the other things the same,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: then it will be ordered list.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So, here 1, 2, 3 will come.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You can also do ABC on this 1, 2, 3.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You can also do capital ABC.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You can also do Roman numbers.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You can also do it with the help of CSS.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You can see here,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: if I write li in UL,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: it will come like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: If I write li in OL,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: it will come 1, 2, 3.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: This is the example of ordered list.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: This is the example of definition list.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Definition list is rarely used.
